btrfs: fix transaction commit blocking during trim of unallocated space  When trimming unallocated space, btrfs_trim_fs() holds the device_list_mutex for the entire duration while iterating through all devices. On large filesystems with significant unallocated space, this operation can take minutes

btrfs: handle user interrupt properly in btrfs_trim_fs()  When a fatal signal is pending or the process is freezing, btrfs_trim_block_group() and btrfs_trim_free_extents() return -ERESTARTSYS. Currently this is treated as a regular error: the loops continue to the next iteration and count it as a bl

btrfs: preserve first error in btrfs_trim_fs()  When multiple block groups or devices fail during trim, preserve the first error encountered rather than the last one.
